body:
Tomoko, great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy Fellows](orgs/breakthrough-energy-fellows) event last week — your panel on grid-scale storage financing was genuinely one of the better sessions I've attended this year. I wanted to follow up on the conversation we had about co-investing frameworks, because I think there's a real opportunity for [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) and Khosla to develop a more structured approach to sharing deal flow at the seed stage, particularly in climate infrastructure where we're both seeing a lot of the same founders. I have two companies in diligence right now that might actually benefit from having both of us at the table, and I'd love your read on them before either of us moves to term sheet. Would you have 30 minutes sometime in the next week or two to get into the specifics? I'll send over a proposed agenda if that works on your end.

— Amara
